title: The Great Market Miscalculation: Pfizer's True Value Remains Untapped

Pfizer Inc. and Opko Health have been jointly developing and commercializing Ngenla since 2014, with the goal of transitioning patients from Pfizer's Genotropin, which has been facing competition from biosimilars. In addition, on July 23, the FDA approved Litfulo, making it the first drug on the market to treat adults and adolescents with severe alopecia areata.

title: FDA Approves Pfizer's RSV Vaccine For Older Adults—It Could Be Available This Fall
text: The agency is also considering approving the RSV shot for pregnant people to protect infants from birth.
